source: Compiled from FTMO Academy, PropJournal, TradersBrain, CoinLaw, TradeLikeMaster — April 2026

pass_rates.key_insight: 75% fail Phase 1. Primary killer is max drawdown, NOT profit target.

risk_per_trade_vs_pass_rate.agent_rule: LOCK at 0.5% ($500 on $100k). This is non-negotiable.

breakdown.agent_action: Monitor total drawdown in real-time. Alert at 4%, halt at 8%.
Track daily P&L before every trade. Halt at $800 soft stop, hard stop at $1000.

breakdown.note: No longer relevant — FTMO removed time limit in 2024.

breakdown.agent_action: Block trades 30min before/after high-impact news. Never bypass this.

behavioral_failure_patterns.description: After a loss, immediately entering another trade 2-3x bigger to recover. This is the #1 kill pattern.
behavioral_failure_patterns.signature: Lot size spike after consecutive losses
behavioral_failure_patterns.agent_rule: After 2 consecutive losses: HALT for 24h. No exceptions. Agent enforces this mechanically.

behavioral_failure_patterns.description: Taking 5-10 trades on day 1. Hits daily loss limit. Spends rest of challenge recovering.
behavioral_failure_patterns.agent_rule: Max 1-2 trades per day. Quality over quantity. Agent requires review_trade before every entry.

behavioral_failure_patterns.description: Moving SL from 30 to 50 pips when trade goes against you. Doubles risk. Kills daily budget.
behavioral_failure_patterns.agent_rule: SL is set at entry and NEVER moved further away. Only trail in profit direction.

behavioral_failure_patterns.description: NFP, FOMC, CPI create massive volatility. One spike can wipe days of progress.
behavioral_failure_patterns.agent_rule: No trades within 30min of high-impact news. Agent blocks this automatically.

behavioral_failure_patterns.description: 60% of Phase 1 passers fail Phase 2 because they become reckless after proving they can do it.
behavioral_failure_patterns.agent_rule: In Phase 2: DROP risk to 0.5% per trade. Only need 10 winning trades at 2:1 RRR. Patience wins.

behavioral_failure_patterns.description: Hitting 10% in 4 days from 1-2 large trades. FTMO flags this as inconsistent — funded account can be refused.
behavioral_failure_patterns.agent_rule: Consistency is required. No single day should account for >30% of total challenge profit. Spread across minimum 4+ trading days.

behavioral_failure_patterns.description: Holding positions over Friday close. Monday gap can breach daily limit before reaction.
behavioral_failure_patterns.agent_rule: Alert user if holding position into Friday 20:00. Recommend closing or sizing down to survive 2% gap.

behavioral_failure_patterns.description: Checking dashboard once a day. By then the violation already happened.
behavioral_failure_patterns.agent_rule: Agent tracks daily P&L in real-time via MT5 bridge. User gets warning at 70% and 90% of daily limit.

daily_loss_limit.calculated_from: PREVIOUS day's closing balance — NOT current equity
daily_loss_limit.trap: If your account was $102k at midnight and you lose $5,100 intraday, limit triggered even if you were up earlier.
daily_loss_limit.our_soft_stop: $800 (0.8%) — agent halts trading at this level

max_total_drawdown.floor: $90,000 — account can NEVER go below this, even intraday
max_total_drawdown.calculated_from: Initial balance, not high water mark
max_total_drawdown.trap: If account grows to $108k and you give back $18,001, challenge is over.
max_total_drawdown.our_crisis_threshold: 4% ($4,000) — crisis mode activates, lot size halved

consistency_review.description: FTMO reviews trading BEHAVIOR after you pass — not just P&L
flags: Single day accounting for >70% of total profits
Lot sizes changing dramatically between phases
NFP/FOMC spike accounting for majority of profit
Strategy completely different from Phase 1 in Phase 2
consistency_review.consequence: Funded account refused or reduced allocation even after passing

optimal_strategy_criteria.timeframes: Daily for trend bias + H4 for entry (matches our EMA system)

sessions.avoid: Asian session — low liquidity, patterns fail to follow through
sessions.overlap: London/NY overlap (13:00-16:00 UTC) — highest quality setups

entry_requirements: Key S/R level or EMA confluence
Candle confirmation (engulfing, pin bar, inside bar)
Trading during London or New York session only

position_management.stop_loss: Technical — never arbitrary. Placed at structure extreme.
position_management.never_do: Move SL further away. Add to losing position. Average down.
position_management.allowed: Trail SL to breakeven after 1:1 reached.

rule_of_thirds.description: Divide daily loss limit ($5,000) into 3 zones
rule_of_thirds.zone_3: $3,000-$5,000 loss (3-5%): STOP. Close positions. Day over.
rule_of_thirds.agent_implementation: Agent uses $800/$1000 soft/hard stops — more conservative than FTMO default

consecutive_loss_protocol.1_loss: Continue normally. Review trade before next entry.
consecutive_loss_protocol.2_losses: HALT for rest of day. No new positions. Mandatory review.
consecutive_loss_protocol.3_losses: HALT for 24 hours. Crisis mode consideration.
consecutive_loss_protocol.agent_rule: This is hard-coded. No override allowed.

profit_protection.after_1pct_daily_profit: Consider stopping for the day — protect gains
profit_protection.after_2pct_daily_profit: STRONGLY recommend stopping. You have secured value.
profit_protection.reasoning: Most FTMO failures happen when traders keep trading after a good start and give everything back.

max_trades_per_day.reasoning: More trades = more chances to hit daily limit. Quality over quantity.

pre_trade_checks: Is daily loss budget available? (reject if <$300 remaining)
Are there 2 consecutive losses today? (halt if yes)
Is there high-impact news within 30min? (reject if yes)
Is total drawdown within safe zone? (<4% green, 4-6% caution, >6% crisis)
Is this trade consistent with today's session? (London/NY only)
Does RRR meet minimum 2:1? (reject if below)
Is lot size within 0.5% risk rule? (auto-calculate and enforce)
Is it Friday after 18:00? (warn about weekend gap risk)
behavioral_warnings: Lot size increased after a loss? (revenge trading alert)
Same pair attempted 3x in one day? (fixation alert)
Daily profit already >1%? (recommend stopping for the day)
Trying to trade during Asian session? (low-probability alert)

phase_specific_adjustments.challenge_phase_1: Risk 0.5%. Need $10k. ~20 winning trades at 2:1. Patient.
phase_specific_adjustments.challenge_phase_2: Drop to 0.5% risk. Need $5k. Only 10 winning trades. Even more patient.
phase_specific_adjustments.funded: Preserve account. Consistency is everything. FTMO monitors behavior.

what_successful_ftmo_traders_do: Risk 0.5% per trade — always. No exceptions for 'high conviction' setups.
Trade only 1-2 sessions per day (London or New York, not both)
Take 1-2 trades max per day, even on great days
Stop trading after hitting 1-1.5% daily profit
After any loss: mandatory review before next trade
After 2 losses: done for the day, no argument
Never move SL further away from entry
Close all positions Friday before 20:00 (weekend gap risk)
Keep a trade journal — record setup, session, news proximity, emotional state
Treat Phase 2 with MORE caution than Phase 1, not less
